## Commit Report — 2026-03-28T19:07:05Z

---

### CONFIRMED — Detroit Pistons ML (Late Scout Pick)

- **Match:** Minnesota Timberwolves vs Detroit Pistons | Tip: 21:30 UTC
- **Pick:** Detroit Pistons ML | Scout odds: N/A (new pick) | Commit odds: 1.98 | Move: N/A
- **ML:** H:1.84 / A:1.98 | ATS: Minnesota -1.0 (1.93/1.89) | O/U: N/A
- **Stake:** €46.75 | Pot: €92.57 | Conf: 65/100 | EV: 0.287

**Decision:** This edge emerged post-Scout from injury confirmations. Detroit (53-20, L10: 8-2, NetRtg +7.8) is substantially the better team vs Minnesota (45-28, L10: 5-5, NetRtg +3.6). Anthony Edwards confirmed OUT for Minnesota (patellofemoral pain), alongside Jaden McDaniels (right knee) and Ayo Dosunmu (right calf) — Minnesota is missing their superstar and two key rotation players. Cade Cunningham is OUT for Detroit (pneumothorax — serious but confirmed, not GTD), triggering franchise_player_rules: confidence -10 to 65, stake -20% applied. Net assessment: Detroit's 8-game record advantage, superior NetRtg by 4.2 points, and elite recent form (8-2 L10) outweigh Minnesota's home-court edge when Minnesota is this shorthanded. Detroit ML at 1.98 clears all validation gates. EV = (0.65 × 1.98) - 1 = 0.287. Total exposure: 12.0% of bankroll (well within 70% cap).

---

### No Draft Picks to Review
Scout submitted no draft picks for this session (empty array). Commit proceeded directly to late scout evaluation.

---

### Slate Summary

A challenging slate for finding confirmed edges tonight, with multiple games featuring extreme ML odds outside valid ranges and widespread injury absences across most matchups. The single committed pick targets the Detroit/Minnesota game where a genuine quality gap (53-20 vs 45-28, NetRtg +7.8 vs +3.6, L10: 8-2 vs 5-5) is temporarily masked by both teams' injury situations — Detroit's underlying strength supports the near-even odds despite Cade Cunningham's absence. Total committed: €46.75 (12.0% of €389.50 bankroll), leaving €342.75 in reserve.

Charlotte ML at 1.43 — below 1.70 floor. Philadelphia ML at 2.85 — above 2.50 ceiling. Both ML markets outside target range. Spread: Charlotte -6.5 at 1.93/1.89 is in range. Charlotte (39-34, L10: 7-3, NetRtg +4.9) vs Philadelphia (40-33, L10: 6-4, NetRtg -0.3). Tyrese Maxey Questionable (franchise player GTD) — per franchise player rules, confidence -10, stake -20%. Spread confidence would be ~62 before Maxey GTD → 52 after → below spread floor of 60. Rejected.

Phoenix ML at 1.08 — extreme favourite, outside 1.70-2.50 range. Utah ML at 8.0 — far above ceiling. Spread: Phoenix -16.5 at 1.92/1.90 in range. Utah is confirmed tanking tier (21-53, L10: 2-8). **DRAFTED PICKS:**

**Minnesota Timberwolves vs Detroit Pistons — Detroit Pistons ML @ 2.20 (€38.95)**
Both franchise players confirmed OUT via NBA official PDF (Edwards: Patellofemoral Pain Syndrome; Cunningham: Pneumothorax). With both stars absent, Detroit's depth advantage (53-20, NetRtg +7.8) over Minnesota (45-28, NetRtg +3.6) becomes decisive. McDaniels also OUT for Minnesota. NetRtg gap of 4.2pts clears the 4.0 threshold. Duren and Harris GTD for Detroit cost -10 confidence. Final confidence 57, EV = 0.254 (strong). Road game at 2.20 offers genuine value.

**Atlanta Hawks vs Sacramento Kings — Atlanta Hawks -15.0 Spread @ 1.93 (€58.43)**
Sacramento is a confirmed tank team (19-55) with four key players OUT (LaVine, Murray, Hunter, Eubanks). NetRtg gap is 12.1 pts — among the largest on tonight's slate. Atlanta is home, motivated (play-in race), and showing L10 8-2 form. Tanking teams historically do not cover spreads. Confidence 72, EV = 0.390 (exceptional). Best edge on the slate.

**Memphis Grizzlies vs Chicago Bulls — Memphis Grizzlies ML @ 2.38 (€38.95)**
Marginal pick — both teams are struggling tank-tier clubs. Home court is the primary edge for Memphis. NetRtg essentially equal (-4.1 vs -4.6). Skills permit betting ON tanking teams at odds ≥ 2.20 with situational reason (home court). Confidence 55, EV = 0.309 clears the bar. Treated as speculative 10% stake.

**REJECTED GAMES:**
- Milwaukee Bucks vs San Antonio Spurs — ANOMALY: ML odds 11.0/1.05 entirely outside target range; extreme line driven by Giannis OUT.
- Charlotte Hornets vs Philadelphia 76ers — NO EDGE: Both ML odds outside range; spread confidence drops below 60 floor due to Maxey GTD.
- Phoenix Suns vs Utah Jazz — NO EDGE: Suns ML 1.08 too short; spread -16.5 too large given Phoenix's own depleted roster and L10 4-6.
- OKC Thunder vs New York Knicks — NO EDGE: No markets within target range; only ML odds available, both outside bounds.

**Slate Quality:** Moderate slate with one genuine strong edge (Hawks spread vs Sacramento tanks). The Detroit pick carries real value with the Edwards absence confirmed. Memphis pick is speculative and should be treated as low-conviction. Pace data partially unavailable (SAS, DET = 0.0) suppresses O/U signals, though no O/U markets were available tonight regardless. Total committed: €136.33 (~35% of bankroll, within 70% daily cap).

late_rejections.reason: Time gate: game tips at 23:00 UTC, only 2 minutes from commit time — less than 20-minute minimum required. Excluded.

Jaylen Brown confirmed OUT (Achilles) per NBA official report — was Questionable at Scout. Brown is franchise-adjacent All-Star; his absence significantly weakens Boston's -5.0 spread thesis. Atlanta L10 9-1. Celtics ML 1.48 below floor; Hawks ML 2.70 above ceiling. Boston spread at 1.88 (valid range) but confidence cannot reach 60 with Brown OUT vs elite-form Atlanta. Insufficient edge.
NetRtg gap only 1.3 pts (CLE +4.0 vs MIA +2.7) — below 4pt threshold for spread conviction. Both MLs out of valid range. No injury changes create new edge. Insufficient edge.
Memphis L10 1-9, tank-tier team. No valid thesis for backing Memphis +13.5. Houston NetRtg gap favors Rockets, not Grizzlies. Both MLs out of range. No edge on any market.
